entries.label: unrequited love
entries.description: Love marked by distance, asymmetry, or impossibility.

entries.label: divine love
entries.description: Love directed toward or interpreted through the divine.

entries.label: impermanence
entries.description: The transience of worldly conditions, beauty, and life.

entries.label: memory
entries.description: Remembering, recollection, and the persistence of the past.

entries.label: ego
entries.description: Selfhood interpreted as attachment, identity, or resistance.

entries.label: surrender
entries.description: Yielding the self before love, truth, destiny, or the divine.

entries.label: separation
entries.description: Distance, estrangement, or removal from the beloved or source.

entries.label: love
entries.description: Relational attachment, affection, or desire.

entries.label: longing
entries.description: A sustained ache of desire toward an absent fullness.

entries.label: grief
entries.description: Sorrow in response to loss, absence, or irretrievability.

entries.label: exile
entries.description: Displacement from home, belonging, or spiritual proximity.

entries.label: faith
entries.description: Trust, conviction, or inward reliance amid uncertainty.

entries.label: mortality
entries.description: Awareness of finitude, death, and the limits of embodied life.

entries.label: silence
entries.description: Quiet, inward pause, or the felt absence of speech.

entries.label: hope
entries.description: Expectation that something meaningful remains possible.

entries.label: wine
entries.description: A layered symbol that may indicate pleasure, ecstasy, transgression, or mystical intoxication.

entries.label: rose
entries.description: A symbol of beauty, fragility, allure, and sometimes suffering.

entries.label: mirror
entries.description: A symbol of reflection, self-knowledge, manifestation, or truth.

entries.label: ocean
entries.description: A symbol of vastness, dissolution, depth, and abundance.

entries.label: candle
entries.description: A symbol of illumination, self-consuming devotion, or vulnerable beauty.

entries.label: moth
entries.description: A symbol of fatal attraction, annihilating love, or surrender to light.

entries.label: desert
entries.description: A symbol of barrenness, wandering, testing, and spiritual exposure.

entries.label: absence
entries.description: The felt presence of what is missing or withdrawn.

entries.label: memory
entries.description: The conceptual persistence of prior presence, meaning, or experience.

entries.label: ego
entries.description: A concept of selfhood, self-attachment, or self-assertion.

entries.label: surrender
entries.description: A concept of yielding, relinquishment, or letting go.

entries.label: transcendence
entries.description: Movement beyond ordinary limitation, perception, or selfhood.

entries.label: mortality
entries.description: The concept of finitude, perishability, and death-bound existence.

entries.label: Ghalib
entries.description: Mirza Ghalib, central Urdu and Persian poet.

entries.label: Diwan-e-Ghalib
entries.description: Canonical collection for the initial Ghalib poem pilot.

entries.label: Urdu
entries.description: Urdu language.

entries.label: Ghazal
entries.description: Poetic form built around autonomous yet resonant couplets.

entries.label: Couplet
entries.description: Smallest meaningful unit for many Urdu ghazals in the pilot.
